detailed_description.heading: Universal High-Speed Module
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik XS+31LC10D is a versatile single-mode optical module designed to support data rates of 1G, 10G, and 25G, making it an ideal solution for both upgrades and new installations. As a direct successor to the popular 10G SFP+ 10km module, it offers enhanced functionality without increasing costs. Supporting SFP, SFP+, and SFP28 formats, it ensures maximum compatibility across various MikroTik devices, including the CCR2004-1G-12S+2XS and other multiport devices. Operating over distances of up to 10km via a Dual LC UPC connector, it’s perfect for enterprise, ISP, and data center applications. Its single-mode design and 1310nm wavelength provide stable, high-quality connections even in dense network environments. The module’s compact form factor, energy efficiency, and wide temperature tolerance make it a future-proof choice for growing network demands. Whether you're scaling up or modernizing, this module simplifies your infrastructure.

Built to meet the challenges of modern networks, the XS+31LC10D ensures reliable performance in critical applications. With support for single-mode fiber and operating temperatures from -40°C to 70°C, it’s suitable for controlled environments like data centers and enterprise networks where consistent performance is crucial. Its low power consumption of just 1.5W and compact SFP form factor allow seamless integration into MikroTik and compatible hardware. Advanced design enables efficient long-distance links up to 10km, providing flexibility for network architects and IT teams. Combined with the ability to handle 1G, 10G, and 25G speeds, this module becomes a cost-effective and scalable choice for organizations seeking to upgrade their infrastructure without multiple device types. MikroTik’s attention to quality ensures the XS+31LC10D delivers on reliability, speed, and compatibility for demanding network workloads.
